Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Malachi]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Overlord Malachi has official soldiers who are raiders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Malachi's soldiers attacked the village gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Malachi is an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Malachi is a kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Overlord Malachi manages a corner of Damasca in the name of the King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Overlord Malachi's reputation is that he is distant but just.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Overlord Malachi is a ruler of a realm containing Myria village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — The prisoners are on their way to Malachi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Overlord Malachi has taken people from Simon's village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Overlord Malachi has Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — Overlord Malachi is responsible for this year's sacrifice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Malachi is an Overlord whom the children's father works for as a free merchant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Malachi has soldiers that drag people away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Malachi is a vain man who wears specific colors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Malachi is an Overlord who has a Naraka brand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Malachi's full name is Malachi Daiasus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Malachi is holding Leah and other captives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Malachi is caring for at least one Myrian captive at his own personal expense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Malachi has an officer and soldiers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Malachi Daiasus is an Overlord in service to the Damascan Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Malachi Daiasus is a faithful slave of King Zakareth the Sixth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Malachi has a shining red mark on the palm of his hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Malachi claims that the sacrifice involves only nine people a year from the whole kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Malachi uses a red half-mask that sticks to his face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Malachi can summon a thousand orbs of screaming orange flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Malachi can summon ants the size of wolfhounds that blaze with flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Malachi wears the Ragnarus mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Malachi is an Overlord who wears a crimson mask covering half of his face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Malachi has a branded hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Malachi ordered Leah to be taken from her village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Malachi has a red Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Malachi wears a half-mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Malachi is dead, killed by Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Malachi is the lord over the lands where Simon is located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Malachi Daiasus was responsible for the deaths of at least a dozen Myrian villagers and is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Malachi died on midsummer's eve.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Malachi gave Erastes permission to retire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Overlord Malachi wore a mask that allowed him to call terrifying amounts of power from his Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Malachi is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Overlord Malachi was defeated by Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Malachi conducted a raid on Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Simon rescued Leah from Malachi’s tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Leah was left in Overlord Malachi's hands for weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Malachi was an Overlord and a Traveler of Naraka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Overlord Malachi died one month prior to the council.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Malachi fought with Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Simon played a role in the death of Overlord Malachi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Leah claims she was never in danger from Malachi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin threatens that if anything happens to his sisters, he will make Grandmaster Naraka suffer the same fate as Overlord Malachi.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Malachi is an Overlord with a home in Bel Calem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Malachi used the shattered mask for years.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
